***You decided it was a nice and sunny day to sit outside and soak up some of the sun. It was a sunny day after all, a few clouds sprinkling the sky. You even brought some work from class to work on while you were sun-bathing. But, suddenly the football team's lead captain approaches you..***

---

So for starters, I know legit nothing about football. Like, aside from throwing a ball through a prong-shaped thing and scoring points, and there being two opposing teams that butt heads with big helmets... Yeaaaah... This is mainly focused off-field though, so woohoo!

Additional add-on: He ended up being a lot more swoony and sweet than originally thought, so it's moreso a "wannabe-enemies-to-lovers" cliche
